Preterit.turoyo: məd ḥzele l-u=malaxo <…> d-tayəb w-məʕtarafle b-aloho, šləḥle aǧ=ǧul-ayḏe w-hiwile l-u=moro

Infectum-wa.turoyo: hano u=malko zlām mhayəmno-wa, w-kul yawmo d-ḥušabo əzze-wa l-i=ʕito, w-məʕtaraf-wa, w-šoqal-wa qurbono
translations:
This
			king was a devout man and every Sunday he went to the church,
			confessed and received communion
